# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent datastore security.
# Category: datastore_security

snapshot:
  repository:
    type: s3
    settings:
      bucket: your-s3-bucket-name
      region: your-region
      base_path: elasticsearch-snapshots
      access_key: your-access-key
      secret_key: your-secret-key
      protocol: https
      max_retries: 3
      chunk_size: 100mb
      compress: true
  file_share:
    type: fs
    settings:
      location: /mnt/backup/elasticsearch
      compress: true
      max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec: 40mb
      max_restore_bytes_per_sec: 40mb

snapshot_policy:
  schedule: "0 0 * * *" # Daily at midnight
  name: "<daily-snapshot-{now/d}>"
  repository: s3
  config:
    indices: "*"
    ignore_unavailable: false
    include_global_state: true
  retention:
    expire_after: 30d
    min_count: 5
    max_count: 50

security:
  s3:
    role_arn: arn:aws:iam::your-account-id:role/your-snapshot-role
  file_share:
    permissions:
      - read
      - write
      - execute

restore:
  repository: s3
  snapshot: "snapshot_name"
  indices: "*"
  rename_pattern: "index-(.+)"
  rename_replacement: "restored-index-$1"
  ignore_unavailable: true
  include_global_state: false
